title: January 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 19''' is the 19th day of the year. 346 days (347 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1973]] – [[Nash Edgerton]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 83|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 83]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Chewbacca (2000) 1|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 1]] published.
*2000 – [[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace 2|''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 2]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Secret Villain]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – "[[Eminence (episode)|Eminence]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars: Journey Through Space (2015)|''Star Wars: Journey Through Space'']] reissued.
*2015 – [[Star Wars: What is a Wookiee? (2015)|''Star Wars: What is a Wookiee?'']] reissued.
*2015 – "[[Idiot's Array (episode)|Idiot's Array]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2018]] – [[Allison Shearmur]] dies.
*[[2020]] – "[[Rebuilding the Resistance]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 11: Rise of the Wookiees]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 18|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 18]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic (2021) 13|''The High Republic'' (2021) 13]] published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures: Galactic Bake-Off Spectacular]]'' published.
*2022 – "[[Chapter 4: The Gathering Storm]]" premiered on [[Disney+]].
